metadata.name: SuperTeam
metadata.description: Seven-stage delivery plugin with main-session-as-orchestrator architecture and hook-enforced trust chain

plugins.name: superteam
plugins.description: V4.7.5 OR self-stop 收口 — 状态机驱动硬约束。删除 V4.7.2 spawned_in_current_turn 启发式（漏洞: spawn → 拿结果 → dump a/b/c → 停下）改用纯状态机判定: mode=active && stage∈{execute,review,verify} && !is_subagent_running → block。配套 gate_main_session_scope 加状态机文件 BLOCK 列表防止伪造。逻辑极简: 状态机说还在跑就不允许停下，除非状态机自身出错 OR 永远跑不掉。删除 blocker_summary 逃生暗门、anti-pattern 关键词扫描、verdict 卡死检测、stop_hook_active 滥用记录等启发式垃圾。62/62 测试通过。
